name: Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B
tagline: Smaller, ~50% cheaper 8B precursor to the Flash-Lite tier.
metaDescription: Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B (Google), released 2024-10-03 — part of the Gemini Flash-Lite line. Smaller, ~50% cheaper 8B precursor to the Flash-Lite tier.
overview: Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Flash-Lite line. Released 2024-10-03. Google's fastest and lowest-cost Gemini tier, optimized for intelligence per dollar.
What's notable in this version: Smaller, ~50% cheaper 8B precursor to the Flash-Lite tier.
